Configure Centre-Managed Commodities and Services
preconditions: Coupa Admin has necessary permissions and access to configure centre-managed commodities and services

scenario: Track Planned, Negotiated, and Cost Avoidance Savings
preconditions: Sourcing event has been created and savings have been planned, negotiated, and cost avoidance tracked

scenario: Flip Purchase Request into Sourcing Event
preconditions: Purchase request has been created and user has necessary permissions to flip it into a sourcing event

scenario: Create Sourcing Event for Centre-Managed Commodity with Approved Supplier
description: Create a sourcing event for a centre-managed commodity with an approved supplier and verify that the approval workflow is aligned with the Limits of Authority (DOA / LOA).

scenario: Attempt to Create Sourcing Event for Non-Centre-Managed Commodity with Unapproved Supplier
description: Attempt to create a sourcing event for a non-centre-managed commodity with an unapproved supplier and verify that the system prevents the creation of the sourcing event.

scenario: Track Planned, Negotiated, and Cost Avoidance Savings for Sourcing Event
description: Create a sourcing event and track planned, negotiated, and cost avoidance savings to verify that the system accurately differentiates between these types of savings.

scenario: Flip Purchase Request into Sourcing Event
description: Flip a purchase request into a sourcing event and verify that the system correctly updates the sourcing event with the relevant information.

scenario: Customize Sourcing Settings and Configurations as Coupa Admin
description: Log in as a Coupa Admin and customize sourcing settings and configurations to verify that the system allows for the necessary customizations.

scenario: Create Sourcing Event with Planned Savings
Attempt to Create Sourcing Event with Inactive Category
Validate Planned Savings Tracking for Sourcing Event

precondition: Centre-managed commodities and services are defined with specific criteria (e.g., annual spend threshold)

scenario: Attempt to Flip Purchase Request into Sourcing Event without Required Approval
Create Sourcing Event for Centre-Managed Commodity
description: As a Coupa Admin, create a sourcing event for a centre-managed commodity and verify that the system settings and administrative configurations are relevant to sourcing activities.

scenario: Attempt Sourcing Event for Non-Centre-Managed Commodity
description: As a Coupa Admin, attempt to create a sourcing event for a non-centre-managed commodity and verify that the system prevents the creation of such an event.

scenario: Track Planned Savings for Sourcing Event
description: As a Sourcing Manager, create a sourcing event and track planned savings, verifying that the system accurately differentiates between planned, negotiated, and cost avoidance savings.

scenario: Flip Purchase Request into Sourcing Event
description: As a Sourcing Manager, flip a purchase request into a sourcing event and verify that the system correctly updates the sourcing event details.

scenario: Align Approval Workflows with DOA/LOA
description: As a Coupa Admin, configure approval workflows for different sourcing event types and verify that they align with the Limits of Authority (DOA/LOA) for each event type.
